waitByDeprivation.note: Median elective referral-to-treatment wait by patient deprivation quintile (IMD)

deprivationGap.note: Gap in median wait between most and least deprived quintile patients

totalWaitingList.note: Total NHS England elective referral-to-treatment waiting list

sources.name: NHSE
sources.dataset: Statistical Process Control — Elective Inequalities Dashboard

metadata.methodology: RTT waiting times linked to patient IMD quintile using LSOA of patient residence. Median wait and over-52-week percentages calculated by deprivation quintile from NHS England elective inequalities analysis. Total waiting list from monthly RTT statistical release.
knownIssues: IMD linkage uses home postcode which may not reflect current deprivation accurately for mobile populations
Deprivation gap analysis covers England only — comparable data not available for devolved nations
2020-21 waiting list spike reflects COVID-19 elective pause, not underlying demand change
